positive: A minimalist, elegant illustration featuring a majestic Bengal tiger curled up in a stylized, circular composition. The tiger should have vibrant orange and black stripes against a deep, contrasting indigo background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curves and modern graphic design, utilizing thick, clean outlines and flat color areas for a bold, impactful silhouette. Incorporate subtle botanical elements like stylized monstera leaves or tropical vines wrapping around the tiger for a decorative, harmonious feel. The overall mood is regal, peaceful, and striking. High contrast, perfect for screen printing on fabric. --ar 1:1 --style graphic-novel --quality best
